fixture.description: Repo uses an i18n t() helper (Welcome.tsx). New component hardcodes a user-facing string instead of using t() — an i18n convention violation.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that the user-facing string in src/ui/Goodbye.tsx ('Goodbye, see you soon!') is hardcoded instead of going through the project's i18n t() helper (which the sibling Welcome.tsx uses), recommending t()/a translation key, at DEBT severity or higher. FAIL if the hardcoded user-facing string is not flagged as an i18n issue.

expected_behavior: A11y/i18n agent flags the hardcoded user-facing string and points to the established t() convention
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT flag non-user-facing identifiers as i18n issues
